title: Conventional Commits for all commits
description: Every commit message starts with a type prefix: feat / fix / docs / refactor / test / chore / build / ci. Subject line is imperative, present tense, max 72 chars. Body explains why, not what.
example:
feat(auth): support passkey login on macOS Safari

The webauthn library upgraded to support the
platform-authenticator API. Wire it into the existing
login flow so Safari users can register a passkey from
the profile screen.
